'''zhahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irreplaceably|irreplaceably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irreplaceably|irreplaceably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhahate|zhahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhahatesher|zhahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahatesherĂ«m|zhahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhahatero|zhahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhahateshĂ«|zhahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahateshĂ«m|zhahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhahatero|gokizhahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhahateshĂ«|gokizhahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahateshĂ«m|gokizhahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhahankerom|gozhahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhahankeshĂ«|gozhahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhahankeshĂ«m|gozhahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhahankeya|gozhahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhahaterom|zhahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahatemu|zhahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhahateya|zhahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhahaterom|gokizhahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahatemu|gokizhahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhahateya|gokizhahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhahahate|zhahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhahahatesher|zhahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahahatesherĂ«m|zhahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhahahatero|zhahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhahahateshĂ«|zhahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahahateshĂ«m|zhahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhahahatero|gokizhahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhahahateshĂ«|gokizhahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahahateshĂ«m|gokizhahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhahahankerom|gozhahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhahahankeshĂ«|gozhahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhahahankeshĂ«m|gozhahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhahahankeya|gozhahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhahahaterom|zhahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahahatemu|zhahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhahahateya|zhahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhahahaterom|gokizhahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahahatemu|gokizhahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhahahateya|gokizhahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠte|zhĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠtesher|zhĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠtero|zhĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠhĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠterom|zhĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠtemu|zhĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠhĂŠteya|zhĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠhĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠhĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafhafte|zhafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafhaftesher|zhafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafhaftesherĂ«m|zhafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafhaftero|zhafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafhafteshĂ«|zhafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafhafteshĂ«m|zhafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafhaftero|gokizhafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafhafteshĂ«|gokizhafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafhafteshĂ«m|gokizhafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafhafnkerom|gozhafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafhafnkeshĂ«|gozhafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafhafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafhafnkeya|gozhafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafhafterom|zhafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafhaftemu|zhafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafhafteya|zhafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafhafterom|gokizhafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafhaftemu|gokizhafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafhafteya|gokizhafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
